caption: A man with blond hair wearing a black t-shirt is seen in a small picture-in-picture window, positioned in front of a computer monitor and a white brick wall. He speaks and gestures with his hands throughout the sequence. The main screen initially features a large, metallic, 3D logo reading "U1" set against a green and blue digital background with horizontal lines. A bright green glow emanates from the base of the logo. As the scene progresses, the background shifts abruptly from the digital "U1" display to a dynamic, cinematic scene showing a dark structure amidst glowing blue-green crystals and a swirling white energy vortex. In the final frame, the man in the inset window continues to react, raising his hand as the chaotic environment unfolds on the main screen.
